title: AutoPlug-Plugin
description: Auto-Update your plugins and execute AutoPlug-Client console commands from in-game.
body:
#### Should work on newer Minecraft versions too.
# Installation
### You must have [AutoPlug-Client v5.10.0](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/autoplug-automatic-updater-for-plugins-mods-server-java-itself.78414/) or higher installed for this plugin to work.
1. Download the latest AutoPlug-Plugin version and stop your server
2. Move the downloaded jar into the /plugins directory
3. Start your server

# What can it do?
Its actually pretty straightforward. It enables you to execute AutoPlug-Client console commands from in-game (even over an in-game GUI).

### Commands, perms, and more here: https://github.com/Osiris-Team/AutoPlug-Plugin
